purpose: Native product unboxing loop video. Hands-and-product interaction.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: — {cultural_constraints_injection} | Motion: Native product unboxing video of {product_descriptor}: hands carefully open premium packaging, reveal product inside, hold up for camera angle, soft natural daylight, hyper-realistic hands and packaging detail, no face visible, premium reveal pace, 6 seconds
anti_patterns: Avoid trying to substitute with image-to-video fallback chain — native generation is the point
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: V03. Saudi adaptation guidance: Default hands styled as Saudi/Arab. Critical: no face visible. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per week.
